BeliefDataStatus.description: Freshness, completeness, and degraded-signal state for one belief snapshot.

feature_completeness.description: Fraction of expected features available to the recognizer.
feature_completeness.title: Feature Completeness

ai_available.description: Whether AI services were available for optional review layers.
ai_available.title: Ai Available

degraded_modes.description: Explicit degraded modes active for this snapshot.
degraded_modes.title: Degraded Modes

freshness.description: Compact freshness label for UI display.
freshness.title: Freshness

completeness.description: Compact completeness label for UI display.
completeness.title: Completeness

BeliefDataStatus.title: BeliefDataStatus

BeliefStateSnapshot.description: Append-only current market-understanding snapshot consumed by UI and review flows.

instrument_symbol.description: Instrument symbol described by this belief state.
instrument_symbol.title: Instrument Symbol

observed_at.description: Observed market timestamp represented by the belief state.
observed_at.title: Observed At

stored_at.description: Persistence timestamp for the belief state.
stored_at.title: Stored At

profile_version.description: Instrument-profile version used for this belief state.
profile_version.title: Profile Version

engine_version.description: Recognizer build version used for this belief state.
engine_version.title: Engine Version

recognition_mode.description: Recognition operating mode used for this belief state.

regime_posteriors.description: Top regime posteriors for the current state.
regime_posteriors.title: Regime Posteriors

event_hypotheses.description: Parallel event hypotheses for the current state.
event_hypotheses.title: Event Hypotheses

active_anchors.description: Active memory anchors that influence the current posterior.
active_anchors.title: Active Anchors

missing_confirmation.description: Aggregated missing confirmations across the leading event hypotheses.
missing_confirmation.title: Missing Confirmation

invalidating_signals_seen.description: Aggregated invalidating or weakening signals currently in view.
invalidating_signals_seen.title: Invalidating Signals Seen

transition_watch.description: Aggregated transition watch list across leading hypotheses.
transition_watch.title: Transition Watch

notes.description: Additional operator-facing notes emitted by the recognizer.
notes.title: Notes

BeliefStateSnapshot.title: BeliefStateSnapshot

DegradedMode.description:
Explicit degraded conditions that should not stop the engine.

Canonical values are prefixed to match Master Spec v2 and health/UI
badges. Legacy unprefixed inputs are still accepted for backward
compatibility with older persisted payloads and samples.
DegradedMode.title: DegradedMode

EventHypothesisKind.description: Fixed V1 event-hypothesis ontology from Master Spec v2.
EventHypothesisKind.title: EventHypothesisKind

EventHypothesisState.description: Append-only event-hypothesis state emitted by the recognizer.

hypothesis_id.description: Stable hypothesis identifier within one belief snapshot.
hypothesis_id.title: Hypothesis Id

mapped_event_kind.description: Optional tradable event kind mapped from this hypothesis.

missing_confirmation.description: Evidence still missing before stronger confirmation.
missing_confirmation.title: Missing Confirmation

invalidating_signals.description: Signals that would weaken or invalidate the hypothesis.
invalidating_signals.title: Invalidating Signals

transition_watch.description: Competing transitions that the engine is watching.
transition_watch.title: Transition Watch

data_quality_score.description: How much the current data quality supports this hypothesis.
data_quality_score.title: Data Quality Score

evidence_density_score.description: How dense and coherent the supporting evidence is.
evidence_density_score.title: Evidence Density Score

model_stability_score.description: How stable the hypothesis posterior is versus recent prior states.
model_stability_score.title: Model Stability Score

anchor_dependence_score.description: How strongly this hypothesis depends on nearby memory anchors.
anchor_dependence_score.title: Anchor Dependence Score

EventHypothesisState.title: EventHypothesisState

EventPhase.description: Lifecycle phase for one event hypothesis or episode.
EventPhase.title: EventPhase

MemoryAnchorSnapshot.description: Versioned memory-anchor view attached to one belief snapshot.

anchor_type.description: Anchor ontology type such as balance_center or gap_edge.
anchor_type.title: Anchor Type

reference_price.description: Primary price reference for the anchor.
reference_price.title: Reference Price

reference_time.description: Primary time reference for the anchor.
reference_time.title: Reference Time

distance_ticks.description: Distance in ticks from current price to this anchor when the snapshot was emitted.
distance_ticks.title: Distance Ticks

influence.description: Relative influence score of this anchor on the current posterior.
influence.title: Influence

role_profile.description: Current anchor-role profile such as magnet or reversal reference.
role_profile.title: Role Profile

profile_version.description: Profile version used to emit this anchor snapshot.
profile_version.title: Profile Version

MemoryAnchorSnapshot.title: MemoryAnchorSnapshot

RecognitionMode.description:
Recognition operating mode attached to belief-state outputs.

The canonical V1 surface follows Master Spec v2 naming. Legacy
values are still accepted through `_missing_` so older samples and
tests can be read during the closeout transition.
RecognitionMode.title: RecognitionMode

RegimeKind.description: Fixed V1 regime ontology from Master Spec v2.
RegimeKind.title: RegimeKind

RegimePosteriorRecord.description: Append-only probability snapshot for one regime candidate.

evidence.description: Observed evidence supporting this regime probability.
evidence.title: Evidence

RegimePosteriorRecord.title: RegimePosteriorRecord

instrument.description: Instrument symbol scoped by the read-model query.
instrument.title: Instrument

from.description: Inclusive market-time lower bound for the query.
from.title: From

to.description: Inclusive market-time upper bound for the query.
to.title: To

limit.description: Maximum number of rows returned per section.
limit.title: Limit

session_date.description: Session/date label for this belief row.
session_date.title: Session Date

degraded_badges.description: Degraded/freshness badges active for this belief.
degraded_badges.title: Degraded Badges

freshness.description: Compact freshness label copied from the belief data status.
freshness.title: Freshness

completeness.description: Compact completeness label copied from the belief data status.
completeness.title: Completeness

schema_version.description: Schema version for this belief-timeline response.

query.description: Filters used to build this timeline.

current_belief.description: Latest belief-state snapshot in scope when available.
